candidate_definition_hints.text: - [5/2025] We've partnered with [Baseten](https://www.baseten.co/blog/canopy-labs-selects-baseten-as-preferred-inference-provider-for-orpheus-tts-model) to bring highly optimized inference to Orpheus at fp8 (more performant) and fp16 (full fidelity) inference. See code and docs …
